title: `podman pull` doesn't show progress bars on MacOS
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

`podman pull` doesn't show progress bars on MacOS.  `docker pull` shows on Mac.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman pull docker.io/debian`

**Describe the results you received:**
```
$ podman pull docker.io/debian
Trying to pull docker.io/library/debian:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:1671565cc8df8c365c9b661d3fbc164e73d01f1b0430c6179588428f99a9da2e
Copying config sha256:dd8bae8d259fed93eb54b3bca0adeb647fc07f6ef16745c8ed4144ada4d51a95
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
dd8bae8d259fed93eb54b3bca0adeb647fc07f6ef16745c8ed4144ada4d51a95
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
```
$ docker pull docker.io/debian
Trying to pull docker.io/library/debian:latest...
Getting image source signatures
285486683ddd: Downloading [====================>                              ]  56.66MB/138.5MB
ddb2109147fb: Download complete 
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
dd8bae8d259fed93eb54b3bca0adeb647fc07f6ef16745c8ed4144ada4d51a95
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
$ podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.2.1
API Version:  4.2.1
Go Version:   go1.18.6
Built:        Wed Sep  7 04:16:02 2022

```

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @kkimdev!

The issue is related to https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12341.

Hello, @kkimdev. Is it really dup of #12341? That issue seems to be addressing progress reportting in the API. This one is about UX in Macos. Podman in macos does not report progress bars like docker or, as it appears to be the case, podman on linux.  Testing with:

```Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.3.1
API Version:  4.3.1
Go Version:   go1.18.8
Built:        Wed Nov  9 17:43:58 2022
OS/Arch:      darwin/arm64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.3.1
API Version:  4.3.1
Go Version:   go1.19.2
Built:        Fri Nov 11 12:00:31 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64```
@srfiorini I think you're right, I believe that #12341 is a dependency, not dup.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Issue #12341 has been closed, seems like there are no blockers to fix this one.
Can anyone confirm that podman on linux reports download progress? a comment in this thread seems to suggest it does.

@paulftw, macOS, podman-4.8.2

```
$ podman pull debian 
Resolved "debian" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
Trying to pull docker.io/library/debian:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:bc0734b949dcdcabe5bfdf0c8b9f44491e0fce04cb10c9c6e76282b9f6abdf01
Copying config sha256:2a033a8c63712da54b5a516f5d69d41606cfb5c4ce9aa1690ee55fc4f9babb92
Writing manifest to image destination
2a033a8c63712da54b5a516f5d69d41606cfb5c4ce9aa1690ee55fc4f9babb92
```

BTW the same with `load` and `save` as well.
If we use docker cli for podman, it shows the progress while pulling the image.
Same issue with Podman 4.9.3 on macOS (M1 processor)

Same issue with Podman 5.1.0 on macOS.

On Linux, running VS Code as a Flatpak and connecting to podman via podman-remote, there is no progress information displayed when layers are being pulled during the building of dev containers.
Any updates? It's still the same for Podman 5.3.1, and it's annoying when you switch from Docker Desktop

Same thing in Windows. My users are supposed to migrate to Podman, but not being able to see if the pull actually works (by showing some progress) is really hard to explain to them and leads to confusion and frustration.

I'm commenting because I saw some progress in the related PRs, so is there any chance to see the progress bar soon?

Maybe the thread name should also be changed to `podman pull doesn't show progress bars on MacOS and Windows` and add the Windows flag?

:wave: Hey 

why is that the gui version of podman supports progress bar but the cli version do not ?? 

https://imgshare.cc/w4cyuq2i
